brand.name: Sahara
brand.summary: A product engineering portfolio for teams that build, modernize, and automate digital systems with practical AI.

capabilities.name: Product Discovery
capabilities.description: Convert rough ideas into structured PRDs, scope, user stories, and launch plans.

capabilities.name: Product Rebuilding
capabilities.description: Audit existing systems, identify technical debt, and plan modernization paths.

capabilities.name: Workflow Automation
capabilities.description: Turn documents, briefs, and operational notes into summaries, risks, and tasks.

capabilities.name: AI Enablement
capabilities.description: Add source-grounded assistants, structured generation, retrieval, and review flows.

suiteModules.name: MVP Builder and Product Launch Kit
AI Document and Workflow Automation Platform

teamMembers.name: Aarav Mehta
teamMembers.summary: Leads product architecture, delivery planning, and rebuild strategy across portfolio modules.

teamMembers.name: Maya Rao
teamMembers.summary: Designs prompt templates, output schemas, review flows, and source-grounded assistant behavior.

teamMembers.name: Neil Shah
teamMembers.summary: Builds warm, usable interfaces for product discovery, portfolio browsing, and generated reports.

projects.title: AI Capability Portfolio Platform
projects.problem: Static portfolios do not help prospects quickly connect team skills, proof, and relevant sample work.
projects.solution: A public portfolio and assistant that maps sectors, capabilities, team ownership, and case studies.
projects.impact: Reduces pitch explanation time by making proof discoverable through filters and assistant answers.

projects.title: Product Audit and Rebuild Planner
projects.problem: Businesses with legacy systems struggle to decide whether to improve, refactor, rebuild, migrate, or retire.
projects.solution: A guided intake that produces a product health score, risk matrix, recommendation, and modernization roadmap.
projects.impact: Creates a structured modernization plan that supports consulting and technical decision-making.

projects.title: MVP Builder and Product Launch Kit
projects.problem: Raw product ideas often reach development without clear scope, user stories, flows, or launch readiness.
projects.solution: An idea wizard that generates a PRD, MVP scope, feature priorities, user stories, and launch checklist.
projects.impact: Turns early product thinking into development-ready planning artifacts.

projects.title: AI Document and Workflow Automation Platform
projects.problem: Document-heavy teams miss risks, deadlines, and action items because review is manual and repetitive.
projects.solution: A document workspace that extracts summaries, risks, obligations, Q&A answers, and draft tasks for approval.
projects.impact: Reduces manual review effort while keeping users in control of final tasks and outputs.

assistantSuggestions: Which projects are relevant for finance?
What can this team build for consultants?

adminControls.name: Portfolio CMS
adminControls.description: Manage team members, skills, projects, case studies, screenshots, contribution mappings, featured records, and AI-approved content.

adminControls.name: Template Management
adminControls.description: Version prompt templates, report templates, export templates, active states, archived states, and sample test inputs.

adminControls.name: Authentication and Roles
adminControls.description: Represent public visitor, registered user, admin, and super admin access boundaries from the PRD.

adminControls.name: AI Safety and Reliability
adminControls.description: Show source-grounded answers, editable generated outputs, missing-information notes, unsupported-claim handling, and output schema intent.

adminControls.name: File and Export Handling
adminControls.description: Prepare upload validation, private documents, retention controls, markdown export, and future PDF/DOCX/CSV/JSON export paths.

adminControls.name: Audit Logs and Observability
adminControls.description: Track login, upload, delete, generation, export, admin updates, task approval, failures, and permission denials.
